hooks.command: root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)"; [ -z "$root" ] && exit 0; f="$root/app/build.gradle.kts"; [ -f "$f" ] || exit 0; current=$(sed -nE 's/^[[:space:]]*versionCode = ([0-9]+)$/\1/p' "$f" | head -1); [ -z "$current" ] && exit 0; next=$((current + 1)); sed -i -E "s/^([[:space:]]*versionCode = )[0-9]+\$/\1$next/" "$f" || exit 0; ( cd "$root" && git add app/build.gradle.kts && git commit --amend --no-edit >/dev/null 2>&1 ) || exit 0; printf '{"systemMessage":"Bumped versionCode %s -> %s and amended last commit before push"}\n' "$current" "$next"
